zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Clarell於大約1397年出生在英國越可爾阿爾德瓦可時，她的父親Thomas Clarell Sr.34歲，母親Matilda Montgomery19歲。她於1410年1月19日與Sir John FitzWilliam在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1467年4月23日在英國越可爾希亞活享年71歲，埋葬在英國越可爾希亞活。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Clarell于大约1397年出生在英国越可爾阿爾德瓦可时，她的父亲Thomas Clarell Sr.34岁，母亲Matilda Montgomery19岁。她于1410年1月19日与Sir John FitzWilliam在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1467年4月23日在英国越可爾希亞活享年71岁，埋葬在英国越可爾希亞活。

nameMeanings.name: Clarell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan: from clavell ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.

variants.name: Clavel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alfredo, Angel, Bernardina, Carlos, Consuelo, Fernando, Gustavo, Jeronimo, Jorge, Luis, Margarita.  French Andre, Eugenie, Fernande, Jean-Claude, Pierre.
Spanish: from clavel ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.
French: from Old French clavel ‘bolt (of a door or gate)’ or ‘nail, link, ring (of chain mail)’, used as a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller. Compare Clewell .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Clarell was born about 1397, in Aldwark, Yorkshire, England, her father, Thomas Clarell Sr., was 34 and her mother, Matilda Montgomery, was 19. She married Sir John FitzWilliam on 19 January 1410, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 23 April 1467, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Clarell est née environ 1397, à Aldwark, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Clarell Sr., avait 34 ans et sa mère, Matilda Montgomery, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John FitzWilliam le 19 janvier 1410, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 avril 1467, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Clarell um 1397 in Aldwark, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Clarell Sr. 34 und ihre Mutter Matilda Montgomery 19. Sie hat am 19. Januar 1410 in England Sir John FitzWilliam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. April 1467 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Harewood, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Harewood, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Clarell è nata il circa 1397 nel Aldwark, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Clarell Sr., aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Matilda Montgomery, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir John FitzWilliam il 19 gennaio 1410, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 aprile 1467, nel Harewood, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Clarellが約1397年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルドワークで生まれた時，父Thomas Clarell Sr.は34歳，母Matilda Montgomeryは19歳であった。1410年1月19日にイギリスでSir John FitzWilliamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1467年4月23日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドで71歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Clarell(이)가 대략 1397년 영국 요르크실르 알드워크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Clarell Sr.(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Montgomery(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1410년 1월 19일 영국에서 Sir John FitzWilliam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1467년 4월 23일 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Clarell nasceu aproximadamente 1397, em Aldwark, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Clarell Sr., tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Montgomery, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John FitzWilliam em 19 de janeiro de 1410, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de abril de 1467, em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Clarell родилась около 1397 г. в местности алдварк, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Clarell Sr. было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Montgomery, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John FitzWilliam 19 января 1410 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 23 апреля 1467 г. в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Clarell nació aproximadamente 1397, en Aldwark, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Clarell Sr., tenía 34 años y su mamá, Matilda Montgomery, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sir John FitzWilliam el 19 de enero de 1410, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de abril de 1467, en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
